/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Snake.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Arena.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Story.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Renderer2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Renderer3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Renderer4D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake_evolution.dir/src/UI.cpp.o -o snake_evolution  /opt/homebrew/lib/libraylib.dylib
